tokenBudget.globalLimit: Total mandatory startup reads must not exceed 5000 tokens (AGENT_BOOTSTRAP.md + repo AGENTS.md + this file + logs/index.md top 10 entries / 3000 tokens max).
tokenBudget.policy: Keep compact; move details to full indexes or raw.

startupRules: Read AGENT_BOOTSTRAP.md, repo AGENTS.md, then this file.
Read logs/index.md top 10 entries (up to 3000 tokens) for recent task context.
Read preferences/profile only when this index is insufficient or memory rules change.
Search JSONL by task keywords; read only matching lines.
When matching records are similarly relevant or conflict, prefer newer active records by updatedAt, createdAt, then timestamp.
Read raw only when index hits are insufficient.
If any required document output is mojibake/garbled, it does not count as read; fix encoding or re-read as UTF-8 before acting.
End every chat by writing a task log to Memories/logs/{taskName}_{yyyyMMddHHmmss}.md and updating logs/index.md.
Every attempt_completion MUST generate a memoryName (format: memory_xxxxx_YYYYMMDD) and pass it to TaskComplete Hook.
The Hook validates memoryName prefix 'memory_'; if invalid, memory write is rejected.
TaskStart Hook generates a readId (format: readId=read_xxxxx_YYYYMMDD) in contextModification.
AI MUST include the readId in its first response to confirm memory was read.
If AI does not return readId, user should require AI to re-read memory.

retrievalOrdering.status: prefer active; read superseded/archived only for source tracing or when active records are insufficient
retrievalOrdering.recencyTieBreaker: for similarly relevant or conflicting records, prefer newer updatedAt, then createdAt, then timestamp
retrievalOrdering.unverifiedRule: newer unverified records do not override older verified active records without rechecking

environmentRules: Windows PowerShell profile C:\Users\s7514\Documents\WindowsPowerShell\profile.ps1 sets UTF-8 input/output plus Get-Content/Select-String defaults to prevent Chinese mojibake.

writebackPolicy.taskLog: Always write task log to Memories/logs/; always update logs/index.md.

growthControl.activeIndexPolicy: Keep active indexes bounded; archive, compact, or supersede old entries.
growthControl.searchResultLimit: Usually top 5 to 10 relevant lines; sort close matches by recency.
growthControl.logsIndexCap: If >100 entries, archive to logs/archive-YYYYHn.md, keep latest 50 in active index.
